title: Unit, Integration, Fuzz, Race, Leak, and CLI Behavior Evidence · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent conservation group receives a different region, command sequence, API fixture, cache age, concurrency budget, accessibility need, platform, and injected failure and transfers unit, integration, fuzz, race, leak, and cli behavior evidence into a changed layered deterministic Go verification harness. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of layered deterministic Go verification harness with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through predic…
objectives: Assign pure domain, handler, cache, transport, persistence, subprocess, race, fuzz, and controlled live-smoke evidence to separate risks.
Use named table cases with minimal original fixtures, changed inputs, explicit wants, and isolated setup without loop-variable mistakes.
Prefer narrow fakes for decisions and httptest for real HTTP boundaries while asserting requests, responses, lifecycle, and faults.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
